content: Phase 1: Get OpenAI GPT-4o integration playbook (Emergent Key)
Phase 1: Design MongoDB schema + workflow state machine POC
Phase 1: Build POC endpoints (seed, create workflow, validate, publish, execute, tasks, approvals, audit)
Phase 1: Test POC with Python script - 21/21 tests passed
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design agent
Phase 2: Build full backend (auth, workspaces, RBAC, catalogue, workflows, execution, tasks, approvals, notifications, audit)
Phase 2: Build full frontend (40+ pages/views with stunning UI)
Phase 2: Seed full department catalogue (80-100+ process models)
Phase 2: End-to-end testing with testing agent
Phase 3: AI assistance, advanced features, polish
